title: MacOS: dyld: malformed mach-o image: dylib load command #12 string extends beyond end of load command
body:
Hello,

I'm using yosys on MacOS Mojave 10.14.2 installed using homebrew:

```
$ brew install yosys
...
$ brew info yosys
yosys: stable 0.8 (bottled), HEAD
Framework for Verilog RTL synthesis
http://www.clifford.at/yosys/
/usr/local/Cellar/yosys/0.8_1 (97 files, 19.2MB)
  Poured from bottle on 2019-01-22 at 12:57:47
From: https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/blob/master/Formula/yosys.rb
==> Dependencies
Build: bison ✘, pkg-config ✔
Required: libffi ✔, python ✔, readline ✔
==> Options
--HEAD
	Install HEAD version
==> Analytics
install: 77 (30 days), 181 (90 days), 474 (365 days)
install_on_request: 77 (30 days), 181 (90 days), 474 (365 days)
build_error: 0 (30 days)
```

When I try to execute yosys I get an error:

```
$ yosys
dyld: malformed mach-o image: dylib load command #12 string extends beyond end of load command
Abort trap: 6
```

I'm new to MacOS thus I'm not sure what exactly causes the issue. A little piece of advice would be much appreciated.
